LLMS Endpoint Usage

Endpoint: /api/llms
Method: POST
Content-Type: application/json
Body: { "prompt": "Your prompt here" }

Response: streaming text or JSON (e.g., { "text": "..." })

Example (curl):

curl -N -X POST https://your-site.com/api/llms \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"prompt":"Summarize the benefits of STEM education."}'

Server notes:
- Implement the server route as an App Router API route (e.g., src/app/api/llms/route.js or .ts).
- For streaming responses return a ReadableStream and set appropriate headers (Content-Type: text/event-stream or text/plain).
- Keep provider keys in environment variables (e.g., OPENAI_API_KEY) and never commit secrets.
- Add authentication, rate-limiting and input validation before calling external LLM providers.

This file is a developer reference only.
